question: give me the name of channels that have both a director younger than 40 and a director older than 60.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT c.Name FROM channel c JOIN director_admin da ON c.Channel_ID = da.Channel_ID JOIN director d ON da.Director_ID = d.Director_ID WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM director d1 WHERE d1.Channel_ID = c.Channel_ID AND d1.Age < 40) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM director d2 WHERE d2.Channel_ID = c.Channel_ID AND d2.Age > 60);

back_translation.intent: 获取年龄小于40或大于60的导演名称

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求获取同时拥有年龄小于40和年龄大于60的导演的频道名称，而SQL反向翻译描述中的过滤条件为'年龄小于40或大于60'，逻辑条件不一致。
